title: Events & Platform
description: The Dubai Mall is a global stage—fashion weeks, brand takeovers, celebrity appearances, and waterfront spectacles that generate earned media far beyond the property line.

hero.title: More than a mall. A platform.
hero.description: Activate at the intersection of tourism, luxury, and live entertainment—with venues from intimate showcases to atrium-scale productions.

highlights.title: Brand activations
highlights.description: Pop-ups, immersive installs, and product launches with guaranteed footfall capture.

highlights.title: Live & cultural moments
highlights.description: Concerts, festivals, and seasonal programming tied to Dubai's event calendar.

highlights.title: Fashion & beauty platforms
highlights.description: Runway moments, beauty launches, and influencer ecosystems inside Fashion Avenue.
